sqlMap.select: select b.car_idx, b.term_idx, cc.cost_idx ,(select CompanyName from sgerp.dbo._TCACompany WITH(NOLOCK) where CompanySeq = a.COM_CD) as com_nm ,convert(varchar(10), a.CAR_GET_DATE, 121) as car_get_date, a.CAR_TYPE, a.CAR_NO, u.user_nm ,case when a.state = '2' then c.code_name + '(' + convert(varchar(10),a.CAR_DISPOSE_DATE, 121) + ')' else c.code_name end as state ,convert(varchar(10), b.STR_DATE, 121) + ' ~ ' + convert(varchar(10), b.END_DATE, 121) as sosok_gigan ,(select CompanyName from sgerp.dbo._TCACompany WITH(NOLOCK) where CompanySeq = b.COM_CD) as user_com_nm ,isnull(cc.USE_COM_CD, b.com_cd) as use_com_cd ,isnull(cc.USE_STR_DATE, case when b.str_date < convert(date, #year# + '-01-01') then convert(date,#year# + '-01-01') else b.str_date end ) as use_str_date ,isnull(cc.USE_END_DATE, case when b.end_date > convert(date, #year# + '-12-31') then convert(date,#year# + '-12-31') else b.end_date end ) as use_end_date ,cc.COST_ACCEPT_CD from tb_car a WITH(NOLOCK) inner join TB_CAR_USER_TERM b WITH(NOLOCK) on a.idx = b.car_idx left join tb_car_cost cc WITH(NOLOCK) on b.term_idx = cc.term_idx left join tb_code c WITH(NOLOCK) on a.state = c.CODE and c.code_type= 'carState' left join FIM.dbo.TB_USER u WITH(NOLOCK) on a.[USER_ID] = u.[USER_ID] where a.use_yn = 'Y' and b.STR_DATE <= #year# + '-12-31' and b.end_date >= #year# + '-01-01' and a.com_cd = #comCd#
sqlMap.update: merge tb_car_cost cc using ( select #costIdx# as cost_idx ,#termIdx# as term_idx ,#useComCd# as use_com_cd ,#useStrDate# as use_str_date ,#useEndDate# as use_end_date ,#costAcceptCd# as cost_accept_cd ,#sessionId# as last_upt_user_id ) b on ( cc.cost_idx = b.cost_idx ) when matched then update set term_idx = b.term_idx ,use_com_cd = b.use_com_cd ,use_str_date = b.use_str_date ,use_end_date = b.use_end_date ,cost_accept_cd = b.cost_accept_cd ,last_upt_user_id = b.last_upt_user_id ,last_upt_dt = getdate() when not matched then insert ( term_idx, use_com_cd, use_str_date, use_end_date, cost_accept_cd, last_upt_user_id, last_upt_dt ) values ( b.term_idx, b.use_com_cd, b.use_str_date, b.use_end_date, b.cost_accept_cd, b.last_upt_user_id, getdate() );

update tb_car_cost set term_idx = #termIdx# ,gas_cost = #gasCost# ,insurance_cost = #insuranceCost# ,repair_cost = #repairCost# ,tax_cost = #taxCost# ,etc_cost = #etcCost# ,last_upt_user_id = #sessionId# ,last_upt_dt = getdate() where cost_idx = #costIdx#
sqlMap.select: select b.car_idx, b.term_idx ,convert(varchar(10), a.CAR_GET_DATE, 121) as car_get_date, a.CAR_TYPE, a.CAR_NO, u.user_nm, (select CompanyName from sgerp.dbo._TCACompany WITH(NOLOCK) where CompanySeq = a.COM_CD) as com_nm, case when a.state = '2' then c.code_name + '(' + convert(varchar(10),a.CAR_DISPOSE_DATE, 121) + ')' else c.code_name end as state, (select CompanyName from sgerp.dbo._TCACompany WITH(NOLOCK) where CompanySeq = b.COM_CD) as user_com_nm, cc.USE_COM_CD, (select CompanyName from sgerp.dbo._TCACompany WITH(NOLOCK) where CompanySeq = cc.USE_COM_CD) as use_com_nm, cc.USE_STR_DATE, cc.USE_END_DATE, cc.COST_ACCEPT_CD, cc.cost_idx, cc.gas_cost, cc.insurance_cost, cc.repair_cost, cc.tax_cost, cc.etc_cost, STUFF( (SELECT ',' + SLIP_ID FROM TB_CAR_COST_SLIP CS WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CS.COST_IDX = cc.cost_idx AND CS.COST_GUBUN = '1' AND CS.CAR_COST_TYPE = 'G' FOR XML PATH('') ) ,1, 1, '') AS gas_slipseq, STUFF( (SELECT ',' + SLIP_ID FROM TB_CAR_COST_SLIP CS WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CS.COST_IDX = cc.cost_idx AND CS.COST_GUBUN = '1' AND CS.CAR_COST_TYPE = 'I' FOR XML PATH('') ) ,1, 1, '') AS insurance_slipseq, STUFF( (SELECT ',' + SLIP_ID FROM TB_CAR_COST_SLIP CS WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CS.COST_IDX = cc.cost_idx AND CS.COST_GUBUN = '1' AND CS.CAR_COST_TYPE = 'R' FOR XML PATH('') ) ,1, 1, '') AS repair_slipseq, STUFF( (SELECT ',' + SLIP_ID FROM TB_CAR_COST_SLIP CS WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CS.COST_IDX = cc.cost_idx AND CS.COST_GUBUN = '1' AND CS.CAR_COST_TYPE = 'T' FOR XML PATH('') ) ,1, 1, '') AS tax_slipseq, STUFF( (SELECT ',' + SLIP_ID FROM TB_CAR_COST_SLIP CS WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CS.COST_IDX = cc.cost_idx AND CS.COST_GUBUN = '1' AND CS.CAR_COST_TYPE = 'E' FOR XML PATH('') ) ,1, 1, '') AS etc_slipseq from tb_car a WITH(NOLOCK) inner join TB_CAR_USER_TERM b WITH(NOLOCK) on a.idx = b.car_idx left join tb_car_cost cc WITH(NOLOCK) on b.term_idx = cc.term_idx left join tb_code c WITH(NOLOCK) on a.state = c.CODE and c.code_type= 'carState' left join FIM.dbo.TB_USER u WITH(NOLOCK) on a.[USER_ID] = u.[USER_ID] where a.use_yn = 'Y' and cc.USE_STR_DATE >= #year# + '-01-01' and cc.USE_end_date <= #year# + '-12-31' and cc.COST_ACCEPT_CD = #costAcceptCd# and a.com_cd = #comCd#

select CAR_IDX ,TERM_IDX ,COST_IDX ,MAX(CAR_NO) AS CAR_NO ,MAX(CAR_TYPE) AS CAR_TYPE ,MAX(USER_ID) AS USER_ID ,MAX(RENT_TYPE_CD) AS RENT_TYPE_CD ,MAX(INSURANCE_YN) AS INSURANCE_YN ,SUM(DRIVE_DIST) AS DRIVE_DIST ,SUM(DRIVE_WORK_DIST) AS DRIVE_WORK_DIST ,CASE WHEN SUM(DRIVE_DIST) = 0 OR SUM(DRIVE_DIST) IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE convert(varchar, convert(decimal(10,4), SUM(DRIVE_WORK_DIST) /SUM(DRIVE_DIST) * 100)) END + '%' AS DRIVE_WORK_PCT ,MAX(TAX_DEPR_COST) AS TAX_DEPR_COST ,MAX(RENT_COST) AS RENT_COST ,MAX(DEPR_COST) AS DEPR_COST ,MAX(GAS_COST) AS GAS_COST ,MAX(INSURANCE_COST) AS INSURANCE_COST ,MAX(REPAIR_COST) AS REPAIR_COST ,MAX(TAX_COST) AS TAX_COST ,MAX(ETC_COST) AS ETC_COST from ( select cut.CAR_IDX ,cut.TERM_IDX ,cc.COST_IDX ,c.CAR_NO ,c.CAR_TYPE ,cut.[USER_ID] ,cc.RENT_TYPE_CD ,cc.INSURANCE_YN ,cd.DRIVE_DATE ,cd.DRIVE_DIST ,ISNULL(cd.DRIVE_WORK_DIST, 0) + ISNULL(cd.DISTANCE, 0) as DRIVE_WORK_DIST ,cc.TAX_DEPR_COST ,cc.RENT_COST ,cc.DEPR_COST ,cc.GAS_COST ,cc.INSURANCE_COST ,cc.REPAIR_COST ,cc.TAX_COST ,cc.ETC_COST from tb_car_cost cc WITH(NOLOCK) inner join TB_CAR_user_term cut WITH(NOLOCK) on cc.TERM_IDX = cut.TERM_IDX inner join TB_CAR c WITH(NOLOCK) on c.IDX = cut.CAR_IDX
left join TB_CAR_DRIVE cd WITH(NOLOCK) on cd.CAR_IDX = cut.CAR_IDX and cd.[USER_ID] = cut.[USER_ID] and cd.DRIVE_DATE between #year# + '-01-01' and #year# + '-12-31' where cc.USE_STR_DATE >= #year# + '-01-01' and cc.USE_END_DATE <= #year# + '-12-31' and c.COM_CD = #comCd# and cc.COST_ACCEPT_CD IN (1, 2) ) M group by CAR_IDX, TERM_IDX, COST_IDX

select CAR_IDX ,TERM_IDX ,COST_IDX ,MAX(CAR_NO) AS CAR_NO ,MAX(CAR_TYPE) AS CAR_TYPE ,MAX(USER_ID) AS USER_ID ,MAX(RENT_TYPE_CD) AS RENT_TYPE_CD ,MAX(INSURANCE_YN) AS INSURANCE_YN ,SUM(DRIVE_DIST) AS DRIVE_DIST ,SUM(DRIVE_WORK_DIST) AS DRIVE_WORK_DIST ,CASE WHEN SUM(DRIVE_DIST) = 0 OR SUM(DRIVE_DIST) IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE convert(varchar, convert(decimal(10,4), SUM(DRIVE_WORK_DIST) /SUM(DRIVE_DIST) * 100)) END + '%' AS DRIVE_WORK_PCT ,MAX(TAX_DEPR_COST) AS TAX_DEPR_COST ,MAX(RENT_COST) AS RENT_COST ,MAX(DEPR_COST) AS DEPR_COST ,MAX(GAS_COST_ADJ) AS GAS_COST ,MAX(INSURANCE_COST_ADJ) AS INSURANCE_COST ,MAX(REPAIR_COST_ADJ) AS REPAIR_COST ,MAX(TAX_COST_ADJ) AS TAX_COST ,MAX(ETC_COST_ADJ) AS ETC_COST from ( select cut.CAR_IDX ,cut.TERM_IDX ,cc.COST_IDX ,c.CAR_NO ,c.CAR_TYPE ,cut.[USER_ID] ,cc.RENT_TYPE_CD ,cc.INSURANCE_YN ,cd.DRIVE_DATE ,cd.DRIVE_DIST ,ISNULL(cd.DRIVE_WORK_DIST, 0) + ISNULL(cd.DISTANCE, 0) as DRIVE_WORK_DIST ,cc.TAX_DEPR_COST ,cc.RENT_COST ,cc.DEPR_COST ,cc.GAS_COST_ADJ ,cc.INSURANCE_COST_ADJ ,cc.REPAIR_COST_ADJ ,cc.TAX_COST_ADJ ,cc.ETC_COST_ADJ from tb_car_cost cc WITH(NOLOCK) inner join TB_CAR_user_term cut WITH(NOLOCK) on cc.TERM_IDX = cut.TERM_IDX inner join TB_CAR c WITH(NOLOCK) on c.IDX = cut.CAR_IDX
left join TB_CAR_DRIVE cd WITH(NOLOCK) on cd.CAR_IDX = cut.CAR_IDX and cd.[USER_ID] = cut.[USER_ID] and cd.DRIVE_DATE between #year# + '-01-01' and #year# + '-12-31' where cc.USE_STR_DATE >= #year# + '-01-01' and cc.USE_END_DATE <= #year# + '-12-31' and c.COM_CD = #comCd# and cc.COST_ACCEPT_CD IN (1, 2) and cc.GAS_COST_ADJ IS NOT NULL ) M group by CAR_IDX, TERM_IDX, COST_IDX
sqlMap.update: update tb_car_cost set rent_type_cd = #rentTypeCd# ,insurance_yn = #insuranceYn# ,tax_depr_cost = #taxDeprCost# ,rent_cost = #rentCost# ,depr_cost = #deprCost# ,gas_cost_adj = #gasCost# ,insurance_cost_adj = #insuranceCost# ,repair_cost_adj = #repairCost# ,tax_cost_adj = #taxCost# ,etc_cost_adj = #etcCost# ,last_upt_user_id = #sessionId# ,last_upt_dt = getdate() where cost_idx = #costIdx# and term_idx = #termIdx#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT D.AccName, D.AccSeq, G.MinorSeq, G.MinorName, C.CrAmt, C.DrAmt, A.AccDate, B.Summary, B.SlipID, E.DeptName, F.CCtrName FROM SGERP.dbo._TACSlip AS A WITH(NOLOCK) inner JOIN SGERP.dbo._TACSlipRow AS B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.CompanySeq = B.CompanySeq AND A.SlipMstSeq = B.SlipMstSeq LEFT OUTER JOIN SGERP.dbo._TACSlipCost AS C WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.CompanySeq = C.CompanySeq AND B.SlipSeq = C.SlipSeq LEFT OUTER JOIN SGERP.dbo._TDAAccount AS D WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.AccSeq = D.AccSeq AND B.CompanySeq = D.CompanySeq LEFT OUTER JOIN SGERP.dbo._TDADept AS E WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.CostDeptSeq = E.DeptSeq AND C.CompanySeq= E.CompanySeq LEFT OUTER JOIN SGERP.dbo._TDACCtr AS F WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.CostCCtrSeq = F.CCtrSeq AND C.CompanySeq = F.CompanySeq LEFT OUTER JOIN SGERP.dbo._TDAUMinor AS G WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.UMCostType = G.MinorSeq AND B.CompanySeq = G.CompanySeq WHERE A.companyseq = #companySeq# AND B.Slipseq IN
#slipSeqArr[]#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tb_car_cost_slip where cost_idx = #costIdx# and cost_gubun = #costGubun#

insert.selectKey: insert into tb_car_cost_nolog ( COM_CD , USE_STR_DATE , USE_END_DATE , GAS_COST , INSURANCE_COST , REPAIR_COST , TAX_COST , ETC_COST , LAST_UPT_USER_ID , LAST_UPT_DT ) values ( #comCd# ,#useStrDate# ,#useEndDate# ,#gasCost# ,#insuranceCost# ,#repairCost# ,#taxCost# ,#etcCost# ,#sessionId# ,getdate() ) select scope_identity() as idx

sqlMap.select: select cc.idx, cc.com_cd, tc.com_nm, cc.use_str_date, cc.use_end_date, gas_cost, insurance_cost, repair_cost, tax_cost, etc_cost, STUFF( (SELECT ',' + SLIP_ID FROM TB_CAR_COST_SLIP CS WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CS.COST_IDX = cc.idx AND CS.COST_GUBUN = '2' AND CS.CAR_COST_TYPE = 'G' FOR XML PATH('') ) ,1, 1, '') AS gas_slipseq, STUFF( (SELECT ',' + SLIP_ID FROM TB_CAR_COST_SLIP CS WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CS.COST_IDX = cc.idx AND CS.COST_GUBUN = '2' AND CS.CAR_COST_TYPE = 'I' FOR XML PATH('') ) ,1, 1, '') AS insurance_slipseq, STUFF( (SELECT ',' + SLIP_ID FROM TB_CAR_COST_SLIP CS WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CS.COST_IDX = cc.idx AND CS.COST_GUBUN = '2' AND CS.CAR_COST_TYPE = 'R' FOR XML PATH('') ) ,1, 1, '') AS repair_slipseq, STUFF( (SELECT ',' + SLIP_ID FROM TB_CAR_COST_SLIP CS WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CS.COST_IDX = cc.idx AND CS.COST_GUBUN = '2' AND CS.CAR_COST_TYPE = 'T' FOR XML PATH('') ) ,1, 1, '') AS tax_slipseq, STUFF( (SELECT ',' + SLIP_ID FROM TB_CAR_COST_SLIP CS WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CS.COST_IDX = cc.idx AND CS.COST_GUBUN = '2' AND CS.CAR_COST_TYPE = 'E' FOR XML PATH('') ) ,1, 1, '') AS etc_slipseq from TB_CAR_COST_NOLOG cc WITH(NOLOCK) inner join TB_COMPANY tc WITH(NOLOCK) on cc.com_cd = tc.com_no where com_cd = #comCd# and use_str_date <= #useEndDate# and use_end_date >= #useStrDate#
